title: senecio serrulatus
intro: Senecio serrulatus, commonly known as groundsel, is a biennial or annual plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and pyrrolizidine alkaloids. Groundsel is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Senecio serrulatus, such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices, can be used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant medicinally.
